name: RCB OE TL.Z./Wienerberger
summary: Wienerberger AG is the world's largest producer of bricks and a leading supplier of clay roof tiles, concrete pavers, and pipe systems in Europe. The company manufactures and sells building materials and infrastructure solutions for residential and non-residential construction, as well as for infrastructure projects and is headquartered in Vienna, Austria. Wienerberger's business model revolves around providing sustainable and innovative building material solutions, with a focus on energy efficiency and environmental responsibility.
